name: Python Development Template
postCreateCommand: if [ -f pyproject.toml ]; then uv sync; fi && if [ -d .venv ]; then grep -qxF 'source ${containerWorkspaceFolder}/.venv/bin/activate' ~/.bashrc || echo 'source ${containerWorkspaceFolder}/.venv/bin/activate' >> ~/.bashrc; fi && if ! command -v claude >/dev/null 2>&1; then curl -fsSL https://claude.ai/install.sh | bash; fi && claude --version || true
